---
title: "Bharat Market Pulse"
---

# Bharat Market Pulse

Bharat Market Pulse is a portfolio monitoring and research-assist pipeline for Indian markets.

It:
- extracts holdings from screenshots or structured data
- fetches signals from trusted market sources
- applies analysis and action mapping
- generates daily report artifacts

## Pipeline stages

1. Extraction (Agent JSON / LLM / OCR fallback)
2. Source collection
3. Analysis and action table generation
4. Swarm sandbox summary
5. Report export

- [Quickstart](quickstart.qmd)
- [Architecture](architecture.qmd)
- [Limitations](limitations.qmd)

> Disclaimer: This tool supports research and monitoring workflows. It is not investment advice.
